views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing last night's sleep score ring, weekly bar chart, current streak, sleep debt indicator, and quick-log FAB

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Log a sleep session: bedtime/wake-time pickers that auto-compute duration, quality star slider, mood picker with emoji icons, disruptor selector, dream toggle, and optional notes

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap colored by sleep quality, tappable date cells revealing that night's details, filterable by mood or disruptor

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly/monthly duration trend lines, quality distribution donut, mood-vs-quality correlation scatter, disruptor frequency breakdown, bedtime consistency gauge, and AI-generated insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: lastNightSleepHours
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Duration in hours computed from most recent entry's bedtime and wakeTime, handling cross-midnight arithmetic

viewModelComputedProperties.name: lastNightQuality
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Quality rating of the most recent sleep entry (1-5)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: sleepScore
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Composite 0-100 score weighting duration (40%), quality (35%), and bedtime consistency (25%). Duration scores max at 7-9h range, quality maps 1-5 to 0-100, consistency measures std deviation of bedtime over 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageHours
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean sleep duration across the last 7 calendar days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageQuality
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean quality rating across the last 7 calendar days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: sleepDebtHours
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Cumulative deficit vs daily goal over the trailing 7 days. Negative means surplus. Formula: (goalHours * daysWithEntries) - totalLoggedHours

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days where user logged sleep AND met the daily hour goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bedtimeConsistencyScore
viewModelComputedProperties.description: 0-100 score based on standard deviation of bedtime over last 14 entries. <15min SD = 100, >90min SD = 0, linear between

viewModelComputedProperties.name: qualityTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Compares this week's avg quality to last week's: 'improving', 'declining', or 'stable' (within 0.3 threshold)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: durationTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Compares this week's avg duration to last week's: 'improving', 'declining', or 'stable' (within 0.25h threshold)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 7 days of sleep duration as (dayAbbreviation, hours) tuples for bar chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: qualityDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Frequency map of quality ratings (1-5) over all entries for donut/pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of each wake-up mood across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topDisruptor
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Most frequently logged disruptor (excluding 'none') over last 30 entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestSleepDayOfWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Day of week with highest average quality rating across all history

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last night's hours divided by daily goal, capped at 1.0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of contextual insight strings generated from data patterns, e.g. 'You sleep 45min longer on weekends', 'Caffeine nights average 1.2 lower quality', 'Your bedtime has shifted 30min later this month'

dailyGoal.description: Target sleep hours per night, user-configurable

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if the user logged a sleep entry AND the computed duration meets or exceeds the daily goal hours
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare rolling 7-day averages for both duration and quality against the prior 7-day window. Also track bedtime drift (is the user going to bed later over time?) and weekend vs weekday differential
insights: Sleep debt alert: 'You're running a Xh sleep debt this week — consider an earlier bedtime tonight'
Disruptor correlation: 'Nights with [topDisruptor] average X fewer hours and Y lower quality'
Weekend effect: 'You sleep Xh more on weekends — a sign of weekday under-sleeping'
Bedtime drift: 'Your average bedtime shifted Xmin [earlier/later] compared to last month'
Quality-mood link: 'When quality is 4+, you wake up Energized or Rested X% of the time'
Consistency reward: 'Your bedtime consistency is in the top percentile this week — keep it up'
Dream correlation: 'You recall dreams on X% of nights rated quality 4+'
Goal streak celebration: 'X-day streak! You've met your sleep goal every night this week'
